title: Who first described Descemetorhexis without endothelial keratoplasty (DWEK) for the management of Fuchs' corneal endothelial dystrophy?
abstract: We present here in a historical focus on the first descriptions in the 1950's by Louis Paufique of Descemetorhexis without endothelial keratoplasty (DWEK) for the treatment of Fuchs' endothelial dystrophy. This article places the introduction of this surgical technique in the context of its time, describes its principles, and puts into perspective the place of this relevant treatment in the therapeutic arsenal of today and tomorrow.
